requirement_topic.en: EMC, Electrical Safety and Grid Compatibility for Power Banks (230/400 V, 60 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 移动电源的EMC、电气安全及电网兼容性（230/400 V，60 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 行動電源的EMC、電氣安全及電網兼容性（230/400 V，60 Hz）

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display), and any mains-powered chargers supplied with them, are electronic apparatus subject to SASO technical regulations covering electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) and electrical safety, demonstrated through SABER (PCoC + per-shipment SCoC). Conformity is typically shown against SASO-adopted IEC/CISPR standards (e.g., CISPR 32/CISPR 35 family for EMC and IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-class safety for the mains charger). Mains-powered accessories must be rated for the Saudi grid: 230/400 V at 60 Hz — this differs from China's 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so the frequency (60 Hz vs 50 Hz) and the higher nominal voltage must be covered by the charger's ratings and safety evidence. If the power bank incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth indicator, NFC), Saudi radio/type-approval requirements administered through CITC apply in addition to the SASO conformity.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）及随附的任何市电充电器，作为电子装置，须遵守涵盖电磁兼容（EMC）及电气安全的SASO技术法规，并通过SABER（PCoC+逐批SCoC）予以证明。符合性通常依据SASO采纳的IEC/CISPR标准证明（如EMC的CISPR 32/CISPR 35系列，及市电充电器的IEC 62368-1/IEC 60950类安全）。市电供电附件须按沙特电网额定：230/400 V，60 Hz——此与中国的220/380 V、50 Hz不同，因此频率（60 Hz对50 Hz）及更高的标称电压须涵盖在充电器额定值和安全证据中。若移动电源包含无线功能（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙指示、NFC），除SASO符合性外，还须适用由CITC管理的沙特无线电/型号核准要求。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）及隨附的任何市電充電器，作為電子裝置，須遵守涵蓋電磁兼容（EMC）及電氣安全的SASO技術法規，並通過SABER（PCoC+逐批SCoC）予以證明。符合性通常依據SASO採納的IEC/CISPR標準證明（如EMC的CISPR 32/CISPR 35系列，及市電充電器的IEC 62368-1/IEC 60950類安全）。市電供電附件須按沙特電網額定：230/400 V，60 Hz——此與中國的220/380 V、50 Hz不同，因此頻率（60 Hz對50 Hz）及更高的標稱電壓須涵蓋在充電器額定值和安全證據中。若行動電源包含無線功能（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙指示、NFC），除SASO符合性外，還須適用由CITC管理的沙特無線電/型號核准要求。

standards_or_laws: SASO technical regulation for EMC and electrical safety — enforced via SABER (PCoC + SCoC)
SASO-adopted CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 (EMC emissions and immunity) and IEC 62368-1 (audio/video and ICT equipment safety) for mains chargers
Saudi grid rating 230/400 V, 60 Hz — charger ratings and safety evidence must cover this (vs China 220/380 V, 50 Hz)
CITC (Communications, Space & Technology Commission) radio type approval — applicable for products with wireless functions

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — Part 1: Class B equipment) for emissions, and GB/T 17618-2015 (Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics of information technology equipment) for immunity. Mains chargers are designed for China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports, China-grid (220 V/50 Hz) charger ratings, and SRRC approval are NOT recognised as the conformity basis under the Saudi SASO/SABER pathway.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——第1部分：B类设备），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备抗扰度特性限值和测量方法）。市电充电器按中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网设计。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告、中国电网（220 V/50 Hz）充电器额定及SRRC核准，在沙特SASO/SABER路径下不被认可作为符合性依据。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——第1部分：B類設備），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備抗擾度特性限值和測量方法）。市電充電器按中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網設計。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告、中國電網（220 V/50 Hz）充電器額定及SRRC核准，在沙特SASO/SABER路徑下不被認可作為符合性依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics (USB charging IC, protection circuit, display, or wireless function) and their mains chargers must demonstrate EMC and electrical-safety conformity for a Saudi PCoC via SABER. Key gaps versus China: (1) conformity must be against SASO-adopted IEC/CISPR standards, not GB/T 9254 — a CB Test Report can support this but the PCoC must be issued by a SASO-notified body; (2) any bundled mains charger must be rated and tested for the Saudi grid of 230/400 V, 60 Hz, whereas Chinese-market chargers are built for 220/380 V, 50 Hz — the 10 V higher nominal single-phase voltage and the 60 Hz (vs 50 Hz) frequency must be reflected in the charger's ratings, transformer/SMPS design margins, and safety report; (3) wireless variants require CITC radio type approval and must not transmit in Saudi-prohibited bands; (4) Arabic-language safety marking and SABER documentation have no Chinese equivalent. Many Chinese power banks and chargers designed for the domestic grid and SRRC frequencies require re-characterisation for Saudi compliance.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源（USB充电IC、保护电路、显示屏或无线功能）及其市电充电器，须为沙特PCoC通过SABER证明EMC及电气安全符合性。相对中国的主要差距：（1）符合性须依据SASO采纳的IEC/CISPR标准，而非GB/T 9254——CB测试报告可作支持，但PCoC须由SASO认可机构签发；（2）任何随附市电充电器须按沙特电网230/400 V、60 Hz额定并测试，而中国市场充电器按220/380 V、50 Hz制造——单相标称电压高10 V及60 Hz（对50 Hz）频率须反映在充电器额定值、变压器/开关电源设计裕度及安全报告中；（3）无线型号须取得CITC无线电型号核准，且不得在沙特禁用频段发射；（4）阿拉伯文安全标识及SABER文件在中国无对应制度。许多按中国电网和SRRC频率设计的中国移动电源及充电器需经重新表征方可满足沙特合规。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源（USB充電IC、保護電路、顯示幕或無線功能）及其市電充電器，須為沙特PCoC通過SABER證明EMC及電氣安全符合性。相對中國的主要差距：（1）符合性須依據SASO採納的IEC/CISPR標準，而非GB/T 9254——CB測試報告可作支持，但PCoC須由SASO認可機構簽發；（2）任何隨附市電充電器須按沙特電網230/400 V、60 Hz額定並測試，而中國市場充電器按220/380 V、50 Hz製造——單相標稱電壓高10 V及60 Hz（對50 Hz）頻率須反映在充電器額定值、變壓器/開關電源設計裕度及安全報告中；（3）無線型號須取得CITC無線電型號核准，且不得在沙特禁用頻段發射；（4）阿拉伯文安全標識及SABER文件在中國無對應制度。許多按中國電網和SRRC頻率設計的中國行動電源及充電器需經重新表徵方可滿足沙特合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO EMC and electrical-safety technical regulations apply to power banks and their mains chargers placed on the Saudi market, evidenced via SABER (PCoC + SCoC); mains chargers must be rated for the Saudi grid (230/400 V, 60 Hz); CITC radio type approval is mandatory for wireless products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; chargers built for the China grid (220/380 V, 50 Hz); SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks and any bundled mains chargers are subject to SASO EMC and electrical-safety technical regulations, evidenced through SABER (PCoC + per-shipment SCoC). Conformity is shown against SASO-adopted IEC/CISPR standards; CB Test Reports can support but the PCoC must come from a SASO-notified body. Mains chargers must be rated and tested for the Saudi 230/400 V, 60 Hz grid — distinct from China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz. Wireless variants additionally require CITC radio type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports and SRRC approvals are not standalone Saudi conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源及任何随附市电充电器须遵守SASO的EMC及电气安全技术法规，并通过SABER（PCoC+逐批SCoC）证明。符合性依据SASO采纳的IEC/CISPR标准证明；CB测试报告可作支持，但PCoC须来自SASO认可机构。市电充电器须按沙特230/400 V、60 Hz电网额定并测试——与中国的220/380 V、50 Hz不同。无线型号还须取得CITC无线电型号核准。中国GB/T 9254报告及SRRC核准不能作为独立的沙特符合性证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源及任何隨附市電充電器須遵守SASO的EMC及電氣安全技術法規，並通過SABER（PCoC+逐批SCoC）證明。符合性依據SASO採納的IEC/CISPR標準證明；CB測試報告可作支持，但PCoC須來自SASO認可機構。市電充電器須按沙特230/400 V、60 Hz電網額定並測試——與中國的220/380 V、50 Hz不同。無線型號還須取得CITC無線電型號核准。中國GB/T 9254報告及SRRC核准不能作為獨立的沙特符合性證據。

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)
